creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
windowmaker port assumes that several items are in /usr/local
rather than /usr/X11R6 - this causes a fresh install to lack
icons and the Wprefs app.

Fix: 

Fix some paths in the config files via a patch?  Ideally the
defaults will be fixed so that if a user runs wmaker.inst again
it will be fixed up
How-To-Repeat: Install windowmaker port on a system which has not had windowmaker
installed
